[LESSON TITLE]

[5–7 minute lesson]

[Phase] [Module] [Lesson Tag]

Concept

[Explain the concept clearly and simply. This is where the user learns the financial language behind the tool.]

Why it matters

[Explain why this matters in real-world wealth building and financial decision-making.]

Real-world example

[Use a simple example that makes the lesson practical and memorable.]

Key insight

[One important line the user should remember.]

Reflection

[Ask the user a reflective question that connects the lesson back to their own money structure.]
